compute_single_role.includes: VM provisioning, OS config, Sitecore install, role config, smoke test

database_single.includes: Schema migration, data migration, connection string updates, validation

solr_standalone.includes: Solr install, schema copy, index rebuild, search validation

solr_cloud.includes: SolrCloud + ZooKeeper setup, schema migration, collection config, index rebuild, validation

redis_session.includes: Azure Cache provisioning, session state config, SSL setup, testing

cdn_setup.includes: Azure CDN/Front Door setup, origin config, cache rules, SSL, WAF rules

dns_cutover.includes: Record migration, TTL management, cutover plan, validation

ssl_tls.includes: Certificate migration/reissuance, Key Vault upload, binding config, validation

blob_storage.includes: Data transfer, access policy config, Sitecore media provider config, validation

content_serialization_sync.includes: Unicorn/TDS/SCS configuration review, serialization path updates for Azure, initial sync to target, conflict resolution, validation of synced items

xconnect_xdb.includes: xConnect deploy, collection/search config, xDB shard migration, validation

identity_server.includes: Identity Server deploy, client config, SSO integration testing

custom_integration.includes: Endpoint updates, auth changes, connectivity testing, error handling

cicd_pipeline.includes: Pipeline rebuild, artifact config, deployment target updates, testing

monitoring_setup.includes: Azure Monitor, Application Insights, alerts, dashboards, log queries

networking_vnet.includes: VNet design, subnet layout, NSGs, peering, firewall rules, connectivity testing

backup_dr.includes: Azure Backup config, DR strategy, Site Recovery setup, RTO/RPO validation

managed_identity_keyvault.includes: Azure Managed Identity setup for all Sitecore roles, Key Vault provisioning, secret migration from AWS Secrets Manager/Parameter Store, connection string references, access policy configuration

publishing_service.includes: Publishing Service VM provisioning, .NET Core runtime setup, connection string config, publish queue validation, performance tuning

project_management.includes: Planning, coordination, stakeholder comms, status reporting, risk management

testing_validation.includes: Functional testing, performance testing, security validation, UAT support

cutover_execution.includes: Final data sync, DNS switch, smoke testing, go/no-go decision, rollback readiness

content_migration.includes: Content type mapping, field migration, workflow migration, language version sync, validation

code_migration.includes: Pipeline processor migration, event handler updates, API endpoint refactoring, ORM compatibility, unit test updates

frontend_rebuild.includes: Component migration, rendering host setup, build pipeline updates, design system adaptation, cross-browser testing

training.includes: Training material preparation, hands-on workshops, knowledge transfer sessions, documentation

go_live_planning.includes: Cutover runbook, rollback plan, communication plan, go/no-go criteria, stakeholder sign-off

infrastructure_engineer.description: Cloud infrastructure specialist. Handles Azure resource provisioning, networking, security, monitoring.

dba.description: Database administrator. Handles SQL Server migration, performance tuning, HA configuration.

sitecore_developer.description: Sitecore platform specialist. Handles Sitecore configuration, integration updates, content validation.

qa_engineer.description: Quality assurance engineer. Handles test planning, execution, regression, performance testing.

project_manager.description: Project manager. Handles coordination, scheduling, stakeholder communication, risk management.
